title: Desktop & Web UI Interactions
systems: QtApp (PySide6 desktop chat panel + floating button)
DesktopPet (desktop_pet_v2.pyw – animated companion via HTTP on port 41983)
StApp2 (stapp2.py – Streamlit web UI v2, Anthropic theme)

use_cases.name: Send Chat Message
use_cases.description: User types a prompt in the chat input and submits it to the agent backend

use_cases.name: View Streamed Response
use_cases.description: Agent response is streamed token-by-token and displayed live
use_cases.st1_mechanism: agent_backend_stream generator yields partial responses → render_segments()

use_cases.name: Stop / Abort Task
use_cases.description: User stops an in-progress agent task
use_cases.st1_trigger: Sidebar '强行停止任务' button → agent.abort()
use_cases.st2_trigger: '⏹️ 停止生成' button → agent.abort(); session_state.stopping=True

use_cases.name: Switch LLM Backend
use_cases.description: User switches between available LLM chain/links
use_cases.st1_trigger: Sidebar '切换备用链路' button → agent.next_llm()

use_cases.name: Toggle Chat Panel Visibility
use_cases.description: User clicks the floating bot button to show/hide the chat panel

use_cases.name: Drag/Reposition Floating Button
use_cases.description: User drags the floating button to a new screen position
use_cases.trigger: mouseMoveEvent with LeftButton → moves widget within screen bounds

use_cases.name: Upload File Attachment
use_cases.description: User attaches image or file to a message
use_cases.detail: Images encoded as base64, text files inlined up to 6000 chars, others saved to temp/uploaded/

use_cases.name: Browse Chat History
use_cases.description: User navigates past sessions via the History tab

use_cases.name: Browse SOP / Knowledge
use_cases.description: User browses SOP procedures via Tab 2

use_cases.name: Configure Settings
use_cases.description: User accesses settings (model, health check, etc.) via Tab 3

use_cases.name: Copy / Regenerate Message
use_cases.description: User copies assistant message text or triggers regeneration

use_cases.name: Launch Desktop Pet
use_cases.description: User launches the desktop pet companion from the Streamlit sidebar
use_cases.trigger: Sidebar '🐱 桌面宠物' button → subprocess.Popen(desktop_pet_v2.pyw); registers _pet_hook on agent._turn_end_hooks

use_cases.name: View Turn Summaries (Folded)
use_cases.description: Completed agent turns are folded into collapsible expanders with summary title
use_cases.trigger: fold_turns(text) splits LLM turn markers → render_segments() → st.expander()

use_cases.name: Enable/Disable Autonomous Mode
use_cases.description: User allows or stops autonomous agent action (triggered after 30 min idle)
use_cases.st1_trigger: '▶️ 允许自主行动' / '⏸️ 禁止自主行动' buttons → session_state.autonomous_enabled toggle

use_cases.name: Reinject Tools / System Prompt
use_cases.description: User forces re-injection of tools or system prompt into agent LLM context
use_cases.st1_trigger: Sidebar '重新注入工具' → loads tool_usable_history.json, extends backend.history

use_cases.name: Receive Desktop Pet Notification
use_cases.description: Desktop pet displays turn/summary bubble notifications from agent turn-end hooks
use_cases.trigger: _pet_hook(ctx) → _pet_req('msg=...') → HTTP GET to 127.0.0.1:41983; state transitions: walk during task, idle on completion
use_cases.server: HTTP server on port 41983 via BaseHTTPRequestHandler; accepts ?msg= and ?state= query params

use_cases.name: Rename Agent (StApp2)
use_cases.description: User edits the agent name in the top header text input
use_cases.trigger: st.text_input fixed at top → session_state.agent_name; header badge injected via JS

use_cases.name: Adjust Font Size (StApp2)
use_cases.description: User adjusts font scale via sidebar slider
use_cases.trigger: Sidebar slider '字体大小' → build_dynamic_font_update_script(scale) → CSS var injected via JS

key_relationships: FloatingButton composes ChatPanel (holds reference, controls show/hide)
ChatPanel composes _MsgRow widgets (one per message, role=user|assistant)
_MsgRow composes QLabel (user) or QTextBrowser (assistant, Markdown rendered via _md_to_html)
StApp depends_on GeneraticAgent (init() cached, agent.put_task → display_queue)
StApp launches DesktopPet via subprocess; communicates via HTTP on port 41983
DesktopPet (PetBase) handles HTTP GET params: msg=, state= (idle/walk/etc.)
DesktopPet uses SkinLoader + AnimationLoader for sprite animation frames
important_notes: QtApp: frameless, always-on-top PySide6 window; tabs: Chat(0), History(1), SOP(2), Settings(3)
QtApp streaming: QTimer polls _display_queue every ~33ms, updates live _MsgRow widget
StApp: simple Streamlit app, streaming via Python generator + st.write_stream pattern; fold_turns collapses intermediate turns
StApp2: enhanced theme (Anthropic light), autonomous mode, font scale, stop-streaming button, rename agent
Both Streamlit apps use agent.put_task(prompt, source='user') → returns display_queue
DesktopPet runs on port 41983; stapp.py registers turn-end hook to POST state/message updates
Autonomous mode: if last_reply_time > 30 min ago, agent self-triggers a task
